steps.action: Click gear button and then close modal
steps.expected: Modal opens and closes without losing page state
steps.observed: modalOpen toggled true->false; chain stayed 'ethereum' and token input remained prefilled

steps.action: Clear localStorage, reload, open tokenlist modal
steps.expected: Default Uniswap list is present and enabled
steps.observed: Only 'Uniswap Labs Default' shown with '357 tokens on ethereum', enabled toggle, delete disabled

steps.expected: List appears with name and token count
steps.observed: List 'Compound' added with '27 tokens on ethereum'; gear badge changed to '2'
Compound row has enabled toggle and active Delete button

steps.expected: Validation error and no panel mutation
steps.observed: Error shown: 'Invalid tokenlist: must have name and tokens array'; list count stayed 1

steps.expected: Fetch error and no panel mutation
steps.observed: Error shown: 'Failed to fetch: Failed to fetch'; list count remained unchanged

steps.expected: Each row shows name, token count, and enabled/disabled indicator
steps.observed: Rows render tokenlist-item-name, tokenlist-item-count, and toggle indicator state
Error shown: 'Only https:// URLs are allowed'

evidence.network: No request dispatched for non-https scheme

steps.action: After adding Compound list, search 'cUNI' in single-token input
steps.expected: Autocomplete includes token from new list with source label
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 'cUNI — Compound Uniswap (...)' with source 'Compound'

frictions.description: Browser occasionally jumped to about:blank during long command chains.
frictions.resolution: Used shorter command sequences and re-opened localhost before each isolated check.

summary: Tested 7 assertions in group-a: all passed. Gear modal behavior, URL add/error handling, HTTPS enforcement, visual indicators, and autocomplete integration with newly managed lists were confirmed with screenshots and DOM state checks.
